title: Chelonistele devogelii
taxonomy: Chelonistele devogelii is a species of orchid in the genus Chelonistele. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Chelonistele devogelii is a type of epiphytic orchid, which means it grows on other plants or objects. Chelonistele devogelii is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The classification of Chelonistele devogelii is further categorized under the subfamily Epidendroideae.

intro: Chelonistele devogelii, also known as Devogel's orchid or tiger orchid, is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and skin irritations. The bioactive constituents of Chelonistele devogelii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Chelonistele devogelii is used to prepare herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
